ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmark_types" (
  "benchmark_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "benchmark_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark type this benchmark belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of benchmark (e.g., performance, stress) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the benchmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_benchmark_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_type_id") REFERENCES benchmark_types ("benchmark_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "test_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test configuration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the test configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test configuration */,
  "patch_start" INTEGER /* Patch start value for the test configuration */,
  "patch_end" INTEGER /* Patch end value for the test configuration */,
  "offset" INTEGER /* Offset value for the test configuration */,
  "count_ms" REAL /* Count of milliseconds for the test configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark this test belongs to */,
  "test_configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration used for the test */,
  "patch_start" INTEGER /* Patch start value for the test */,
  "patch_end" INTEGER /* Patch end value for the test */,
  "offset" INTEGER /* Offset value for the test */,
  "count_ms" REAL /* Count of milliseconds for the test */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_test_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_configuration_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("test_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_run_history" (
  "test_run_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run history */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test this history belongs to */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test ended */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_run_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test this metric belongs to */,
  "lookup_mus_1" REAL /* Lookup time for 1 item (in microseconds) */,
  "lookup_mus_50" REAL /* Lookup time for 50 items (in microseconds) */,
  "lookup_mus_100" REAL /* Lookup time for 100 items (in microseconds) */,
  "lookup_mus_inf" REAL /* Lookup time for infinite items (in microseconds) */,
  "results1" INTEGER /* Results count for 1 item */,
  "results50" INTEGER /* Results count for 50 items */,
  "results100" INTEGER /* Results count for 100 items */,
  "resultsinf" INTEGER /* Results count for infinite items */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, project manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role this permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plans" (
  "test_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test plan */,
  "test_plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the test plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test plan was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test plan (e.g., draft, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plan_tests" (
  "test_plan_test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test-plan-test association */,
  "test_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test plan this association belongs to */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test this association belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_plan_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plan_tests_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plan_tests_test_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_plan_id") REFERENCES test_plans ("test_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "test_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test plan this collaboration belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this collaboration belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_test_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_plan_id") REFERENCES test_plans ("test_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test this result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "test_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test plan this report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_plan_id") REFERENCES test_plans ("test_plan_id")
)
